subject: biology
title: 21M.1.HL.TZ1.39
question_html:
The pregnancy test for humans is based on detection of the hormone HCG. What is the reason for detection of this hormone indicating pregnancy?

A. HCG is involved in milk production.

B. HCG production is blocked by negative feedback during menstruation.

C. HCG is produced by an embryo.

D. HCG is released during the acrosome reaction.
examiners_html: The basis for this question was an Application in 11.1 (Antibody production and vaccination). Even if candidates did not know that it is the embryo that secretes HCG, they should have been able to eliminate the three distractors and then realise that HCG production by embryos must be the answer.
